blocks.text: Real Madrid's title bid, Norwegian cyclists, and Ruud on clay

Nine points divide Real Madrid from Barcelona — Tuesday's home clash with Alavés is non-negotiable. Norwegian fans get a cycling treat: Tour of Norway kicks off while Ruud opens his Madrid clay campaign.
🚴 Tour of Norway 2026 — Stage 1 rolls out, Halland Johannessen and Leknessund lead Norwegian charge
🎾 Mutua Madrid Open — Casper Ruud opens clay season campaign on his strongest surface
⚽ Real Madrid vs Alavés — Los Blancos must win to keep La Liga title alive
